name: Quarrel
description: A heated argument breaks out among the settlers.

name: Bad Weather
description: A sudden storm catches the caravan off guard.

name: Poor Maintenance
description: The landbase shows signs of neglect.

name: Friendly Wanderers
description: A group of survivors asks to join the caravan.

name: Song and Dance
description: Someone starts a tune, lifting spirits.

name: Old World Relic
description: Scouts find a rusted pre‑war sign: "Now Entering Hope County."

name: Strange Lights
description: At night, glowing orbs drift silently across the sky.

name: Children's Game
description: The children invent a game using pebbles and old bottle caps.

name: Abandoned Vehicle
description: You pass a military convoy, long picked clean.

name: Unexploded Bomb
description: An old artillery shell lies half‑buried beside the road.

name: Refugee Wave
description: A large group of desperate survivors wants to join.

name: Hidden Spring
description: A scout claims there is a reliable water source ahead, but the path is rough.

choices.text: Take the rough path (-5% condition, next water = green)

name: Shortcut
description: A risky shortcut could save time but may damage the landbase.
